series_metadata.series_title: Release of Salvage Equipment or Property Files
series_metadata.series_description: The Release of Salvage Equipment or Property Files record the salvage of equipment or property belonging to the State of Ohio. The Release of Salvage Equipment or Property Files include the Surplus Turn In Document ADM-3672 form that is signed by the appropriate personnel at the Department of Administrative Services.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Release of Salvage Equipment or Property Files in Inventory Control Unit, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and
